graphic_texts.text:
가장 먼저 문제가 
생길 수 있는 곳은 눈입니다.
우주는 중력이 거의 없어서 몸속의 체액이 머리로 몰립니다.
lines: 우주는 중력이 거의 없어서 몸속의 체액이 머리로 몰립니다.

graphic_texts.text:
더 놀라운 건 뼈가
매달 1~1.5%씩 
줄어든다는 겁니다.

그런데도 지구로 돌아오면
걷는 것부터 
다시 적응해야 합니다.

visual_cutting: Use NASA/space real footage or official stills as the base visual layer.
Keep source visuals full-screen vertical; crop/scale aggressively rather than showing empty side bars.
Use Cross Dissolve between major visual changes, commonly 30 frames / 1.0 second.
Allow transition overlap; XML start/end values of -1 should be resolved from neighboring transition boundaries.
Mix video footage and still images; rotate selected clips 180 degrees when the source framing needs inversion.
caption_system: Hook title appears first as a large centered upper/mid graphic for about 3 seconds.
Main captions sit in the lower safe area around normalized y=0.67.
Caption blocks are short, usually 1-3 lines, with deliberate semantic line breaks.
Body caption font repeatedly resolves to NotoSerifKR-Medium; hook title resolves to NotoSansKR-Bold.
Use high contrast white Korean text with dark outline/shadow over moving space imagery.
numeric_guidance: Keep numeric units intact in captions, e.g. 382? and 1~1.5%.
Do not split important numeric expressions across lines unless already grouped with the phrase they explain.
reusable_timing_pattern: Use 2.0-3.0 second caption blocks for punchy beats, and 2.7-3.0 second blocks for explanation beats.
End with a question caption held through the final fade/cross dissolve.

extraction_notes: This file is xmeml version 4 exported from a Premiere/Final Cut style timeline.
Clip start/end values of -1 were resolved using adjacent transition start/end frames or source in/out duration.
Graphic text is stored as GraphicAndType effect names; style values are partly Premiere binary payloads, so font candidates are extracted and color/stroke are estimated.
Track 1 is treated as the main visual cut layer; tracks 2 and 3 are treated as captions/title graphics; track 4 is treated as a guide overlay.
